title: erigeron sumatrensis
intro: Erigeron sumatrensis, also known as mountain fleabane or Sumatran fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erigeron sumatrensis include reducing inflammation, relieving muscle spasms, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Erigeron sumatrensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
